[Author]
SoulColor

Adds
- Beginner Law
- Full map reveal in reincarnator setting
- Magic Array to craft Qi Gather Swords a special mood pill and Spirit Cloth
- The Magic Array also contains special functions.
- Temperature regulating incense burner (placing more than 1 with different settings cause it to malfunction)
- Terraforming
- Map location to gather resources

*Added option at Magic Circle to spawn Coloful Mountain for ppl wo activate the mod midgame*.
